title: FanSafe Phrase
description: Schema for a single entry in the contributor-side phrase source. tools/sync-phrases.js validates this shape before generating FanSafe_PWA/index.html's inline const phraseBook array; there is no runtime data fetch.

category.description: Must match a category id in FanSafe_PWA/index.html's const categories array.

values.description: Per-language phrase text. docs/content-governance.md requires every phrase to exist in all four languages before merge because the UI has no per-language fallback.

reviewStatus.description: Do not claim native-speaker-reviewed or professionally-translated without an entry in reviewedBy. See phrases/PROVENANCE.md for the AI-assisted creation and maintainer-approval record. All phrases remain unreviewed because no independent native-speaker or professional translation review is recorded.

reviewedBy.description: A fluent or native-speaker reviewer per language, especially for emergency and medical phrases. Required by tools/validate-phrases.js when reviewStatus is native-speaker-reviewed or professionally-translated.
